channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: President Biden faces backlash over pardon of Hunter and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden says the US is 'all in' on Africa during his Angola visit meant to counter China
item.description: LUANDA, Angola (AP) — Joe Biden on Tuesday was using the first visit to Angola by a U.S. president to promote Washington's investments in the sub-Saharan African nation and see a slavery museum, where he'll acknowledge the trafficking of humans that once linked the nations' economies.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The Associated Press' top photos of the 2024 US election
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — It's a photograph that defined the 2024 campaign. Donald Trump, campaigning for a second term, raises a fist defiantly toward the sky, blood streaked across his face. But the photo captures just one millisecond of a U.S. presidential campaign unlike any that came before it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A chef whose van was stolen with 2,500 pies inside is urging the thieves to donate the loot
item.description: LONDON (AP) — A British chef has urged thieves who stole a van with 2,500 savory pies inside to “do the right thing” and donate the edible loot to the needy.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump says he'll attend Notre Dame Cathedral reopening celebration in Paris this weekend
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump will attend the reopening celebration for Notre Dame Cathedral in Paris this weekend, his first foreign trip since the election.
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trial date set for Brian Walshe, accused of murdering missing real estate executive wife
item.description: An October 2025 trial date has been set for Brian Walshe, who is charged with killing his 39-year-old wife and mom of three Ana Walshe on New Year's Day 2023.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Native American students miss school at higher rates. It only got worse during the pandemic
item.description: SAN CARLOS, Ariz. (AP) — After missing 40 days of school last year, Tommy Betom, 10, is on track this year for much better attendance. The importance of showing up has been stressed repeatedly at school — and at home.
item.dc:creator: CHEYANNE MUMPHREY, SHARON LURYE and MORGAN LEE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Don't miss these holiday shipping deadlines
item.description: The peak holiday shopping – and shipping – season is underway. If you want to make sure your gifts make it under the tree in time, you'll need to plan ahead.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dark comedy 'A Different Man' surprisingly triumphs at Gotham Awards
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — In a surprise that stunned the audience of Hollywood’s first big awards-season bash, “A Different Man,” a dark comedy about doppelgängers, deformity and authenticity in acting, won best feature film at the 34th Gotham Awards on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: JAKE COYLE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Police say a Hawaii woman disappeared voluntarily and traveled to Mexico
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A Hawaii woman who vanished after landing in Los Angeles three weeks ago disappeared voluntarily as she sought to “step away from modern connectivity” and was last seen crossing into Mexico with her luggage, police said at a news conference where they urged her to contact her dist
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN and JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Already buried under snow, Great Lakes region expected to see more stormy weather this week
item.description: Snow continued to fall Monday around parts of the Great Lakes region, where storm-weary residents who have plowed and shoveled for days faced the prospect of even greater accumulations.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL HILL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: LAPD give update on Maui woman who vanished in Los Angeles
item.description: Authorities are set to update the public Monday evening with the latest details on Hannah Kobayashi, a 30-year-old Maui resident who has been the center of a massive search since she vanished in Los Angeles in early November.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: These are the worst cities for package theft in 2024
item.description: These are the 10 worst cities for package theft in 2024, according to an annual report from SafeWise.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Trump taps investment banker Warren Stephens for UK ambassador
item.description: President-elect Trump announced on Monday that investment banker Warren Stephens would serve as U.S. ambassador to the United Kingdom.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Law enforcement leaders react to Trump selecting Hillsborough Sheriff Chad Chronister as DEA Administrator
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump announced Saturday afternoon he's nominating Hillsborough County Sheriff Chad Chronister to be the next Administrator of the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA).
item.dc:creator: Melissa Marino, WFLA, NBC

item.title: US Postal Service touts timely delivery of mail ballots despite concerns from election officials
item.description: The U.S. Postal Service said Monday nearly 100% of completed mail ballots were returned to election offices within a week for this year's presidential contest, despite hurricanes, some misdirected election mail and delivery concerns raised by state officials.
item.dc:creator: DAVID SHARP and STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Supreme Court doesn't seem convinced FDA was unfair in blocking flavored vapes teen use increased
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A majority of Supreme Court justices didn't seem convinced Monday that federal regulators misled companies before refusing to allow them to sell sweet-flavored vaping products following a surge in teen e-cigarette use.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump taps investment banker Warren Stephens for UK ambassador
item.description: “Warren has always dreamed of serving the United States full time. I am thrilled that he will now have that opportunity as the top Diplomat,” Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Harvey Weinstein hospitalized after 'alarming blood test,' attorney says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Harvey Weinstein was hospitalized Monday following an “alarming blood test,” his attorney said, less than a week after the disgraced movie mogul filed a legal claim alleging substandard medical care at New York City's notorious jail complex.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Coast Guard suspends its search for the crew of a capsized fishing boat in the Gulf of Alaska
item.description: ANCHORAGE, Alaska (AP) — The search for five people believed to be aboard a fishing vessel that capsized in rough seas in the Gulf of Alaska has been suspended, the Coast Guard said Monday. The search lasted nearly a day and covered more than 108 square nautical miles (370 square kilometers).
item.dc:creator: MARK THIESSEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump warns of 'hell to pay' if Hamas doesn't release hostages
item.description: President-elect Trump on Monday threatened to unleash “hell” in the Middle East if hostages held by Hamas in the Gaza Strip are not released before his inauguration Jan.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, NewsNation

item.title: Unions score a major win in Wisconsin with a court ruling restoring collective bargaining rights
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Wisconsin public worker and teachers unions scored a major legal victory Monday with a ruling that restores collective bargaining rights they lost under a 2011 state law that sparked weeks of protests and made the state the center of the national battle over union rights.
item.dc:creator: SCOTT BAUER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: White House unveils 'A Season of Peace and Light' Christmas decorations
item.description: First Lady Jill Biden has decked out the White House with some whimsical decorations to evoke the “peace and light” of the season.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man arrested for allegedly trying to pimp Denver women
item.description: A Los Angeles man was arrested for allegedly trying to pimp two Denver women, and prosecutors are looking for more victims in the area.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, NewsNation

item.title: Missing woman last seen in Littleton, Colorado, found dead
item.description: After a week of searching, a family member told KDVR that Lang was found dead on Sunday night from an apparent suicide.
item.dc:creator: Heather Willard, NewsNation

item.title: DOJ sues group associated with Mormon sect for fences built on Forest Service lands
item.description: The U.S. Attorney's Office is arguing that the Free Land Holders have civilly trespassed and violated the Unlawful Inclosures Act of 1885.
item.dc:creator: Heather Willard, NewsNation

item.title: Missing woman Hannah Kobayashi skipped her flight on purpose, police say
item.description: Kobayashi disappeared and stopped contacting her family just days after missing a connecting flight at LAX.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Hannah Kobayashi missed Los Angeles flight intentionally, police say; family claims evidence shows otherwise
item.description: The family of Hannah Kobayashi, a Hawaii woman who vanished into LA after missing a connecting flight to New York, hit back at claims made by LAPD Chief Jim McDonnell about the case.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chainsaw-wielding man killed by police at assisted living facility
item.description: The man had gotten into the lobby of the building and started confronting residents with the chainsaw, according to investigators.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Hannah Kobayashi's missed flight was 'intentional': LAPD chief
item.description: Kobayashi disappeared and stopped contacting her family just days after missing a connecting flight at LAX.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, ABC 4

item.title: Cyber Monday shoppers expected to set a record on the year's biggest day for online shopping
item.description: Consumers in the United States are scouring the internet for online deals as they look to take advantage of the post-Thanksgiving shopping marathon with Cyber Monday.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: White House celebrates 'peace and light' with holiday décor
item.description: The idea behind the theme, according to the White House, is to encourage the more than 100,000 visitors who pass through the doors at 1600 Pennsylvania Ave. during Christmastime to "embrace the peace and light of the holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, Fox 5

item.title: Biden pardons his son Hunter despite previous pledges not to
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden pardoned his son, Hunter, sparing the younger Biden a possible prison sentence for federal felony gun and tax convictions and reversing his past promises not to use the extraordinary powers of the presidency for the benefit of his family.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, ALANNA DURKIN RICHER and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Big Ten fines Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for postgame melee
item.description: ROSEMONT, Ill. (AP) — The Big Ten Conference announced it fined Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for violating the conference's sportsmanship policy for the on-field melee at the end of the Wolverines' win in Columbus on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
